programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell explore a quirky cottage in Paddock Wood, Kent, a new build in Gnosall, Staffordshire, and a one-bedroom flat in Northampton

programme.title: Defenders UK
programme.desc: A fly-tipper who illegally dumped tonnes of waste in the grounds of an Oldham primary school for children with learning difficulties, leaving the school with a £22,000 bill

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: A teenager fights to save her father's life when he has a heart attack, and a driver loses control of a car, scooping two men up on to the bonnet and crashing through a shop window

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Gary Pe and Nick Hall help two teams search for items in the West Sussex town of Ardingly. Presenter Anita Manning also delves into restoration by learning how to gild a bauble

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Deborah is left out in the cold, and Sid may be the only one who can help her. Daniel, Zara and Harper make an uneasy threesome, and Bear tries to help a friend in need

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts the quiz in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single 'impossible' answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: Escape to the Perfect Town
programme.desc: Presenter Steve Brown helps a bachelor find an ideal property in Guildford, Surrey, on a budget of £420,000

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore and the team are at Wallyford Recycling Centre in East Lothian, where they transform a nest of tables, a tired trolley, and a telephone table

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Five dealers bid against one another to buy intriguing items brought in by members of the public, including a selection of Hornby model railway equipment. Nigel Havers presents

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Amol Rajan present another mix of nationwide reports and live studio-based chat

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Jay is amazed with Honey's strength after she talks to the police again, while Mick is unimpressed when Max offers Linda another shift at the restaurant. Kat comes up with a brainwave to sort out the Slaters' money woes - but Stacey and Kush are not best pleased with the idea. Tiffany is overwhelmed with the more morbid aspects of her new job at the funeral parlour but Rainie and Stuart do their best to make her feel welcome as only they can

programme.title: Children in Need
programme.desc: Ten well-known actors come together to record an album for Children in Need. Cameras follow Helena Bonham Carter, Jim Broadbent, Olivia Colman, Shaun Dooley, Luke Evans, Suranne Jones, Adrian Lester, Himesh Patel, David Tennant and Jodie Whittaker over 12 weeks in the summer of 2019 as they rehearse songs for their album, Got It Covered. Each actor must choose a song that has special meaning for them and must make their cover version their own. The participants also visit some charity projects that Children in Need supports in order to help raise funds and awareness

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Hannah's wedding day arrives, bringing everyone's stories together. David explores memories of his own marriage, Belle makes an unlikely alliance, Hannah confronts the question that has been plaguing her ever since Andy came back into her life, and Gail realises she may be the only one who can help

programme.title: Catch Her If You Can
programme.desc: Documentary following an attempt to expose a successful London businesswoman's double life as a con artist. A suspicious invoice tipped off one of her potential victims, and inspired her to track down other parties who had been fleeced by her in the past. Together, they came up with a plan to expose her misdeeds

programme.title: Rent Like a Boss
programme.desc: Big V and Tobias give their advice on outrageous rental issues, from dealing with nosy neighbours to landlords who do not respect their tenants' privacy. They also help a Manchester resident looking for a flatshare, who insists on bringing a caravan full of theatrical costumes with him to his new home

programme.title: US Election 2020
programme.desc: Katty Kay and Andrew Neil present rolling coverage of the US election result, as either Donald Trump or Joe Biden will be confirmed as president. Trump and vice president Mike Pence are hoping to hold onto the positions they have held for the Republican Party since the last election in 2016, while Barack Obama's former VP Biden and running mate Kamala Harris are looking to regain Democratic control of the White House

programme.desc: Katty Kay and Andrew Neil present rolling coverage of the US election result

programme.desc: Deborah tries to build bridges and brings the team together in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Zara meets a patient who is a little too familiar

programme.title: Escape to the Perfect Town
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin offers advice to house hunters who want to move to the lively market town of Abergavenny in Monmouthshire

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: At Woking Recycling Centre in Surrey, Sarah Moore comes across items to salvage and sell on for a profit, including a retro bureau and two unloved chairs

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Five dealers compete to make an offer on a collection of Matchbox toy cars, a collection of silver-plated goblets, a snuff box, and a model giraffe taken from a carousel

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville's idea to open a new catering arm, offering his customers tasty toasties, doesn't quite go according to plan when his reconditioned toaster blows a fuse. Mr Newbold gets a little bolder in his pursuit of Mrs Rossi, while trying to avoid the Black Widow. Leroy and Willis meet Beth and Ruby with a view to going on a date, but Willis is worried that Ruby's not right for him. David Jason, James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Geoffrey Whitehead star in veteran writer Roy Clarke's much-loved comedy

programme.title: Children in Need: 40 Fabulous Years
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan takes viewers on a funny, poignant and revealing tour across four decades of Children in Need

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Incident Response Officer Andy is dispatched when a call comes in about a reported stabbing, while Adam and Orani are dispatched to treat a long-term heroin addict whose concerned mother has called the ambulance service for help. Elsewhere, Kieran and Mick are dispatched to their second patient of the night, an 82-year-old lady who has fallen at home and has been waiting for an ambulance for two hours

programme.title: Wee Chef!
programme.desc: Without enough young people coming up the ranks restaurants are facing a crisis. This documentary follows five apprentices on a professional cookery course at Belfast's Metropolitan College, learning the basic skills while also experiencing the heat of a real life kitchen

programme.title: The Rap Game UK
programme.desc: The contestants are challenged to collaborate with each other, before facing off in a fearsome clash as they hope to impress DJ Target, Krept and Konan, with guests Yungen and Young T and Bugsey

programme.title: Rap Trip: Underground Scenes Uncovered
programme.desc: FOS and Ransom travel to the Republic of Ireland to discover the underground scene, where they pay a visit to teenage viral sensations Cal and Pepper in Tallaght

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness introduces Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff to his latest creation - an all-electric, all-terrain ice-cream van for the 21st century. Elsewhere, the team tests the battery-powered Honda E, Vauxhall Corsa-e and Mini Electric with a race around a deserted Alton Towers

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.desc: The challenge to row the length of Britain enters its second day, which leads the celebrities faced with tackling wild Welsh water as they row up the coast of Wales. Presented by Freddie Flintoff and AJ Odudu

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Local farmer Colin Judd is devastated when he is forced to place his property in the hands of an auctioneer following the death of his father - but is even more shocked to see his estranged brother at the sale. Debbie Bellamy finds herself in trouble for drink-driving, and David has difficulty with a stubborn pony meant to be pulling a trap full of tourists. Rural drama, with David Lonsdale

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is furious with Sophie for leaving him in the lurch. The Dingles are curious to find out what Zak's new job is. Roy finds Biff and Kelly in a passionate clinch

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy is furious when Vic tells her about Paddy and Viv. Jan asks Zoe if she can take over Linda's job. Robert refuses to visit Jack on his 50th birthday

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Andy is alarmed when Liz tells him Fraser is out of prison. Ken wants to give his relationship with Deirdre one last try. Sally warns Ashley that Mike is selling dodgy goods

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tricia encourages the Duckworths to leave her in charge of the pub. Deirdre tells Ken they should remain just as friends. Becky buys Ashley a Valentine's card

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A house-hunting couple are found dead shortly after viewing a supposedly haunted cottage. Locals claim the property is cursed - but Barnaby and Jones soon hear enough to suspect several builders, developers and estate agents of resorting to murder. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with George Baker, Ruth Gemmell and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The master of a prestigious college asks Morse to investigate the disappearance of one of his colleagues. The subsequent discovery of a dismembered torso soon has everyone fearing the worst - until the missing man turns up alive and well. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, James Grout, Beatie Edney, Sian Thomas and Barry Foster

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The son of a high-profile Jewish businessman is attacked in the grounds of a university, leaving Foyle to consider the possibility that the attack was racially motivated. Meanwhile, in London, tensions mount as charismatic right-wing leader Guy Spencer is released from prison. But is he being set up to take the spotlight off a dangerous espionage operation involving MI6? Elsewhere, Sam becomes acutely aware of the impact of the war on Adam's constituents as she encounters a young boy suffering from whooping cough. Michael Kitchen stars in the 1940s-set crime drama, with Honeysuckle Weeks and Daniel Weyman

programme.title: White House Farm
programme.desc: After a vital discovery at the farm, Stan and Mick feel closer to shoring up their own suspicions about Jeremy. The arrival of Brett, a friend from New Zealand (played by Game of Thrones star Alfie Allen), increases tensions between Jeremy and Julie, while Ann grows ever more alarmed and suspicious of her cousin Jeremy's behaviour, and his handling of the family estate. As preparations for the inquest continue, Stan is concerned that if the bodies are released for cremation, vital evidence will be lost for ever

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The members of an Oxford old boys' cricket team gather for their annual match, unaware that death is waiting at the crease to bowl one of them out for good. Morse sets out to find the culprit - helped as ever by the faithful Lewis, who demonstrates unexpected skill on the pitch. John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Sharon Maughan star in an episode scripted by Oscar-winning director Anthony Minghella

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid and Jean have a lively debate about the war. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The members of an Oxford old boys' cricket team gather for their annual match, unaware that death is waiting at the crease to bowl one of them out for good. Morse sets out to find the culprit - helped as ever by the faithful Lewis, who demonstrates unexpected skill on the pitch. John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Sharon Maughan star in an episode scripted by Oscar-winning director Anthony Minghella

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bernie becomes the target of a series of mysterious and violent attacks, while Peggy is forced to intervene after David finds he can't match the other contestants in an angling competition. Helen is horrified by the arrival of her estranged father in Aidensfield - but he has a bombshell to drop that causes her to rethink their relationship. Rural drama, starring Peter Benson and Sophie Ward

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack goes to see Sarah, but she refuses to listen to him. Butch tries to impress Tara at work, and disaster strikes the orienteering course

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tony frantically searches for Will, Lyn and Dean in the dark. Lisa strongarms Zak into telling her what he has been doing each day. Kelly and Biff spend the night together

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Anne causes Curly to miss a meeting with Eric, which leads to Watts being sacked. Liz is stunned to discover Fraser is buying The Hourglass, and Tricia goes into labour

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tricia is not allowed to hold her baby as he is premature. Curly tells Anne he wants nothing more to do with her. Alan advises Liz not to antagonise Fraser

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the body of a woman is pulled from the river during the local Oak Apple carnival. Closer inspection suggests the drowning was deliberate - and, as the detectives find out more about the villagers, they learn the killing could be linked to the death of the victim's daughter eight years previously. John Nettles and Jason Hughes play the intrepid policemen, with guest star Simon Callow

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The members of an Oxford old boys' cricket team gather for their annual match, unaware that death is waiting at the crease to bowl one of them out for good. Morse sets out to find the culprit - helped as ever by the faithful Lewis, who demonstrates unexpected skill on the pitch. John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Sharon Maughan star in an episode scripted by Oscar-winning director Anthony Minghella

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway appears to have got over his fear of Lewis treading over his newly promoted toes. Their opposites have attracted in the past, and there seems no reason to suspect that they won't now the younger man has got used to the idea of his former mentor coming out of retirement to lend him a hand. Even DS Maddox isn't getting on Hathaway's nerves quite as much, so this rejuvenated trio sets out to discover who murdered American classics student Rose Anderson, whose body has been hauled from the canal with neck and abdomen wounds. Nevertheless, a few red herrings threaten to get in their way of landing the killer. Kevin Whately, Laurence Fox and Angela Griffin star

programme.title: White House Farm
programme.desc: The funerals approach, and without the answers he needs and still more questions being thrown up from White House Farm, Stan's efforts remain fruitless. When all looks lost for Stan and Mick solving the case, a vital witness comes forward. Six-part drama based on the true story of the mass murder of a family in an Essex farmhouse in August 1985, providing a fresh insight into the tragic events. Starring Alfie Allen, Mark Addy and Andrew Frame

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A diary and a parking ticket are found at a murder scene in a multi-storey car park. It is not much to go on, but Morse soon links the clues to a crime of passion involving a jealous husband, his wife and her lover. On the personal front, the Oxford detective's feathers are ruffled by a woman he finds himself attracted to. John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Mel Martin and Amanda Hillwood star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean is delighted when Sid actually agrees with her for once, but their plans for the day end in disaster. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid agrees to buy Mike whatever he wants for his birthday - but is shocked by his request. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken and Sue are embarrassed when Deirdre finds them in bed together. Gail is annoyed that the Baldwins have not taken Roy's offer seriously

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike cannot believe Alma has turned down Roy's offer, and Sue gives Ken an ultimatum. Sally is not happy about working with counterfeit goods and confides in Kevin

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak, Mandy and Butch return from Australia, the Dingles descend on the court just in time for Sam's hearing, and Jack moves into Annie's cottage

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa tries to motivate the Dingles into getting jobs. Robert refuses to spend time with his dad. Sarah finds out that Kathy and Jan both knew about Jack's affair before she did

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The rural drama returns after a winter break. A woman receives a shock when a man claiming to be her dead husband surfaces in the village and attempts to pick up the threads of his former life - though the locals aren't convinced of his identity. Lord Ashfordly's behaviour takes a strange turn after he eats some of Peggy's peculiar batch of mushrooms. Gwen Taylor and Rupert Vansittart star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid returns home from work to be greeted with Sally's shocking news. Family comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid and Jean have a lively debate about the war. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An aristocrat goes missing, along with his collection of explicit erotic paintings - and Morse's investigation provides him with a close-up view of the upper crust's dark side. What is more, there is a further culture shock lying in wait - the prospect of working with a new female pathologist. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Amanda Hillwood, Patricia Hodge and Clifford Rose

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's niece comes to stay in Aidensfield following the breakdown of her marriage, but immediately suffers another blow when her prize racehorse is kidnapped and held to ransom. Romance is in the air for Rosie as a biker gang turns up in town, and a seedy photographer promises to make a star of Phil Bellamy's stepdaughter Jane. Rural drama, starring Vanessa Hehir and Lauren Drummond

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Butch is nervous on his first day of work at Home Farm. Lisa riles Zak when she insists he gets a job. Tony and Becky are stunned when Emma reveals the identity of Geri's father

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack's absence is causing problems on the farm. Tony asks Emma whether Greg forced her into having sex. Sophie has a difficult conversation with Zoe

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally tells Mike she does not want to do anything illegal, and he asks Ashley to help out at the factory. Samantha takes Sean to her self-defence class

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec looks forward to taking Rita to lunch. Sean is furious with Des for double-crossing him. Liz is stunned when Fraser turns up at The Hourglass

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The discovery of a priceless music score leads to startling revelations about its composer's life. As Barnaby and Scott investigate, they discover the manuscript may also provide them with the clue they need to solve the case of a local man found battered to death in his cottage. Guest starring June Whitfield and Trevor Peacock

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An aristocrat goes missing, along with his collection of explicit erotic paintings - and Morse's investigation provides him with a close-up view of the upper crust's dark side. What is more, there is a further culture shock lying in wait - the prospect of working with a new female pathologist. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Amanda Hillwood, Patricia Hodge and Clifford Rose

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at baron Ned Fitzroy's wedding to Beth Porteous when the maid of honour is found pinned to the wall with a dagger. Meanwhile, Cully gets cold feet about tying the knot with Simon and is disappointed to learn the honeymoon to New Zealand will have to be cut short. With his own daughter's nuptials to attend, Barnaby races to unearth the family secrets he is sure lie behind the Fitzroy tragedy. Detective drama, starring John Nettles and Laura Howard

programme.title: White House Farm
programme.desc: Stan and his number two Mick Clark speak to Jeremy and relatives of the murdered family, but their picture of what really happened at White House Farm remains inconclusive. The twins' father Colin Caffell is devastated by his loss, and is initially comforted by Jeremy, while post-mortem examinations reveal nothing to contradict the murder-suicide theory. Meanwhile, relative Ann Eaton cannot believe Sheila was responsible, and discusses her growing suspicions with her brother David Boutflour

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: World Cup Rivalries
programme.desc: Revisiting some of the most riveting matches played by the rival footballing nations

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar agrees to act as go-between, taking ransom money to the kidnappers of the wayward daughter of a rich film producer. However, he has a trick up his sleeve - quite literally - in the shape of a camera disguised as a wrist-watch, so even though he is blindfolded, he can later retrace his steps. Roger Moore directs and stars

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: The outlaws rescue King Richard the Lionheart from a gang of vagabonds - but his gratitude proves disappointingly short-lived. Drama, starring Michael Praed

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Miss King are present when a member of the Acme Precision Combine is stabbed, seemingly by a sleep-walker who has no recollection of the murder. Peter Vaughan guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is asked for protection by newsagent Mr Mukerjee, who has been sent death threats and had a brick thrown through his window. When Terry goes along, he discovers that the problem may be that the shopowner has promised his daughter's hand in marriage to more than one man. Guest starring Saeed Jaffrey

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a foreign student, an apparent cocaine trafficker, is shot dead, Cowley tasks Bodie and Doyle with targetting teenage traffickers who have diplomatic ties with South America. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins, Gordon Jackson and Alice Krige

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Carter's wife Alison is targeted by a hit-and-run driver while performing a routine errand on his behalf. Police investigations reveal she was wearing the coat of a fellow teacher with dubious connections. Patrick Troughton and Liz Smith guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Snooker: Champion of Champions Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the afternoon session on day two from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring two best-of-seven-frame group semi-finals. Presented by Jill Douglas with analysis from Stephen Hendry, Neal Foulds and Alan McManus, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A notorious hard-nosed villain offers to co-operate with the police and gives himself up in return for protection for his wife and their children, so Bodie and Doyle are assigned to perform the task. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: ITV Sport Stories
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces a selection of interviews, clips and profiles from the ITV archives featuring some of the biggest names in sport. In the first edition, Muhammad Ali discusses his ban from boxing and the Rumble in the Jungle, and takes part in an impromptu sparring session, while Brian Clough has a heated on-screen debate with Don Revie, his predecessor at Leeds. Plus, a revealing portrait of Welsh rugby talisman Alun Wyn Jones

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood takes a look back at dare devil jumps by Evel Knievel and Eddie Kidd.

programme.title: Snooker: Champion of Champions Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day two from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring a group final, played over the best of 11 frames. Mark Allen was in good form at this stage last year as he comfortably overcame third seed Mark Selby 6-2, but he was to meet his match against Judd Trump in the semi-finals. Presented by Jill Douglas with analysis from Stephen Hendry, Neal Foulds and Alan McManus, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates

programme.title: Cycling: La Vuelta a Espana Highlights 2020

In the final episode, Jimmy and his team prepare for the arrival of Barbary apes, the park's first ever primates, and the farm also says goodbye to two young reindeer calves

programme.title: Educating Greater Manchester
programme.desc: With GCSEs looming for the current head boy and girl, the search begins for new candidates, and surprise applicant Holly talks candidly about her disability as she makes her bid for the position. Meanwhile, Mr Povey tackles the mental wellbeing of his pupils by arranging for a group of therapy animals to come into the school to help address issues such as anxiety and ADHD

programme.desc: The behind-the-scenes story of how Britain's fastest-growing food delivery company has revolutionised the takeaway industry and how they, and their restaurant partners, are navigating the storm of the coronavirus pandemic. Cameras follow the teams of computer programmers, app developers and salespeople as they manage a network of restaurants and delivery riders that together have transformed the takeaway experience

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Back in 2017, George drafted in architect Chris Mason to help Wendy and Allan, whose Colchester home resembled a block of flats. They ended up with an enormous double-height extension and a Roman-style portico, but the ambitious scheme blew their budget and the project remained unfinished. George returns to find out whether they have managed to finish the property to the same exceptional standards

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets another selection of inventively pointless tasks for the celebrity quintet of Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. Daisy flirts with a security guard, Richard is surprised by some chickens and Johnny convinces Alex to wear sparkly shoes while operating heavy machinery. As ever, Greg Davies decides who is the best of the worst

programme.title: Maxxx
programme.desc: Everyone is talking about Maxxx again when his antics go viral on social media. He and his friends get an invitation to an exclusive showbusiness party, where he tries to strike a record deal. Comedy, written by and starring O-T Fagbenle

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including This Morning, The Million Pound Cube, Strictly Come Dancing, The Undoing, The Yorkshire Vet, First Dates, BBC news reports on the US election and a BBC Breakfast report on the Welsh shopping ban

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back contributors whose differences were the making, or breaking, of their dates, including pharmacist Peter and German shoe manufacturer Gregor. Elsewhere, 26-year-old Nathan may have made a name for himself on the Watford club scene, but could he get on the right track with businesswoman Jade?

programme.title: Blackout
programme.desc: Feature-length docu-drama exploring the effects of a devastating cyber attack on Britain's national grid. Based on expert advice and research, the film combines actual footage recorded during power cuts and other emergencies with fictional scenes and news stories to build a realistic account of the nation being plunged into darkness. Eyewitness reports reveal the impact of the crisis on hospitals, law and order, transport and food and water supplies, as the programme reveals how society might descend into chaos and anarchy during a prolonged blackout

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the 2019 listeria outbreak in UK hospitals that left six dead and asks if enough is being done to protect vulnerable patients from a failing food safety system. She meets scientists to uncover just what listeria is and how the outbreak happened, goes inside a hospital kitchen to see first-hand how ood is made and speaks with an anonymous government whistleblower who reveals cutbacks could mean another deadly outbreak will happen again

programme.title: Nazi Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: The treasure-hunting team travels to Germany, Holland, the USA, Spain and Switzerland to investigate Hermann Goering's massive multi-country art-looting operation, as they identify and track treasures that are still missing today

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: As the furlough scheme comes to an end, the programme follows the response to a job advert for a minimum-wage server role at a Manchester restaurant. Almost 1,000 people apply, including Katie, a cabin services attendant; Faye, a cruise ship dancer; Jake, a hotel manager; and John, a ticket inspector. We get to know them, as well as Abi, the recruitment consultant in charge of narrowing down the field; and Kerry, a mum-of-two who lost her job at Bentley and is desperate to find a new position to avoid the family losing their home. Through the lens of this one position, Dispatches explores the jobs crisis brought on by Covid that is threatening to push unemployment over three million by Christmas

programme.desc: Dada Go teaches Mya Go how to play basketball. Finding her to be a natural, that afternoon the Go family decides to play a basketball match against the Win family

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The fairies' yo-yo has disappeared, and now no one will trust Cloppycorn to pull the wagon again, so Noddy comes to the rescue

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Norman is told to help around the house after Mike has an accident while ironing

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas heads to Brazil where he meets Marcio and Marcia, a pair of wood-burning engines who have never travelled beyond their eucalyptus railway

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You
programme.desc: Josh and Blue are painting their friends, but they're not quite finished. We play Blue's Clues to figure out who else Blue wants to add to her painting

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa decide to pick strawberries at Miss Rabbit's farm

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr Labrador's ice-cream van runs out of ice-cream, so Granny Pig suggests that Peppa and George make their own

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: Steel Awesome hires Hank and Helen to work on his new movie, and Ricky tries to convince him that he needs a sidekick

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: Pirata solves the mystery of a strange light in the water - and restores the reputation of an old pirate

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Harold Humdinger uses a giant robot to take the buildings of Adventure Bay and make his own town, the Mighty Pups must save the day!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Jonathan teaches Paddington how to play football, but the bear kicks the ball into Mr Curry's garden and they decide to get it back by climbing over the fence

programme.title: Daisy & Ollie
programme.desc: It is farmer Fran and postman Geoff's wedding day, and Daddy is anxious about making the best man's speech and Ollie is nervous about being the ring bearer

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit plays with George, and Suzy Sheep keeps Peppa company

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig enters a race to raise money for the school roof, and finds he runs quicker when a wasp chases him

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The gang plays hide-and-seek in a museum

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve head to London to recover more than £21,000 in unpaid court costs after a car accident. Officers Aron and Cona team up to recover almost £7,000 owed after a debtor failed to repay a loan to her ex-partners

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: An incident featuring a wheelie bin and a birthday cake sparks a bitter conflict between two neighbours in Wales, and there are explosive consequences when householders take the law into their own hands after continuous loud music drives them to distraction. Meanwhile, a Suffolk man faces eviction after his fellow residents report his toxic cars to the local environmental health office

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: When Ari returns to town, there still are tensions remaining with Tane. Nikau reels from getting dumped by Bella. Owen wants to leave the Bay, and has asked Roo to join him

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Scarlett, while initially happy to see Ned locked up, is stunned when he is let out on bail. Paul notices someone has stolen a painting from Ned's exhibition

programme.title: The Secret Life of Mrs Claus (2015)
programme.desc: A businesswoman reluctantly agrees to play the role of Mrs Claus in the Christmas display of her family's department store. She finds herself falling for the man playing Santa, whose kindly nature leaves her wondering if he might be the real thing. Festive romance, starring Julie Benz and David Sutcliffe

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey avoids all contact with Rachel, so she tries to repair their friendship by telling him a big lie. Phoebe believes the tea leaves foretell she is about to meet the man of her dreams, and Ross tries to recover his favourite pink shirt from former girlfriend Mona's apartment. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is upstaged by superior public speaker Ross while giving the toast at a wedding anniversary party for their parents - who cause outrage by asking pregnant Rachel to pretend she is married. Meanwhile, Phoebe's boyfriend drives the gang crazy with his boundless enthusiasm. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Scarlett, while initially happy to see Ned locked up, is stunned when he is let out on bail. Paul notices someone has stolen a painting from Ned's exhibition

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: When Ari returns to town, there still are tensions remaining with Tane. Nikau reels from getting dumped by Bella. Owen wants to leave the Bay, and has asked Roo to join him

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: How to Lose a Stone in a Month
programme.desc: With the festive season looming, Ruth Langsford investigates which diets work best for anyone who wants to lose weight fast. Under the supervision of Dr Amir Khan, 12 overweight food lovers go on some of the most extreme diets out there. They include meat-lover Emma, whose love of sausage sandwiches is not helping, and Lynne, whose large takeaways covered in salt have pushed her into the obesity category. They and the others agree to try to shift 14 pounds in a single month

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Teenager Elizabeth, who is being treated for an eating disorder, has recently started vomiting involuntarily, so she and her mother speak to Dr Syed in search of an answer. Mohammed thinks the worst about his headaches and chest pains, but Dr Singal puts his mind at rest, while Pratibha has a pain in her foot, and although Dr Arif quickly diagnoses arthritis, the GP is more concerned with the patient's painkiller intake

programme.title: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Helen has an aneurysm in her brain that could burst at any time and lead to her death within minutes. For doctor Sanjeev Nayak there are no second chances as he embarks on an extraordinary operation to save his patient. Michael's life is also on a knife edge. After collapsing with a cardiac arrest, he was saved by a neighbour giving him CPR. But now the trauma doctors face a double battle - they must quickly assess his head injury and also remove a clot in his artery that is destroying his heart

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: Dominatrix Mistress Lucy demonstrates a new sex toy, millionaire sex entrepreneur Chelsea spends £11,000 on a new hot tub for her trophy five-bedroom house and escort Michelle has a body sculpting beauty treatment as she attempts to lose weight

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A 41-year-old patient is escorted off the premises of Hull Royal Infirmary after verbally abusing a receptionist in the waiting room, but is allowed back into the hospital to have his hand treated after calming down. In resus, Dr Jeremy Osman and a full trauma team attempt to save the life of 18-year-old Jack, who has severe injuries after falling off his scooter at high speed

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: PC Mike Davey and his police dog Bacca are faced with a man armed with knives. In London, a routine car stop late at night suddenly turns into a life-threatening incident when the driver jumps in his car and drives off, leaving PC Nick Morley clinging to the car door

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Dirty Dancing (2017)
programme.desc: An awkward teenager staying with her family at a holiday camp in the 1960s embarks on a life-changing romance with the camp's charismatic dance instructor, despite the disapproval of her parents and the condemnation of society in general. Musical remake of the romantic drama, with Abigail Breslin, Colt Prattes Bruce Greenwood, Debra Messing and Billy Dee Williams

programme.title: Wonderful World of Baby Animals
programme.desc: Alligator babies call to each other as they break out of their eggs, while young gorilla Louango is eager to escape its mother and go climbing. On the Norfolk coast, a grey seal pup finds itself ‘home alone' as mum goes out to sea, and soon discovers how unfriendly the neighbours are - and not just aggressive males

programme.title: Winchester '73 (1950)
programme.desc: A gunslinger tracks down his father's killer, but is unable to exact his revenge because the sheriff of the town makes a point of confiscating all firearms. Instead he challenges him to compete in a shooting competition to win a superb rifle, but when the murderer loses, he steals the coveted prize. Western, starring James Stewart, Shelley Winters, Dan Duryea and Stephen McNally

programme.title: The Sound of Fury (1950)
programme.desc: A criminal recruits a hard-up family man as his accomplice in a kidnapping. But when they murder the hostage, they find themselves at the mercy of revenge-seeking mob, whose anger is stoked by the press stories of a crusading reporter determined the pair will pay the ultimate price for their crime. Depression-era drama, starring Frank Lovejoy, Lloyd Bridges, Kathleen Ryan and Richard Carlson

programme.title: The Last Blitzkrieg (1959)
programme.desc: The son of a Nazi general is selected for a secret undercover mission. He and his men disguise themselves as American soldiers and go behind the Allied lines, with the intention of carrying out acts of sabotage and undermining enemy morale. Second World War drama, starring Van Johnson and Kerwin Mathews

programme.title: The Odessa File (1974)
programme.desc: The detailed diaries of a former inmate of a concentration camp fall into the hands of an investigative journalist. Incensed by what he reads, he embarks on a crusade to discover the prison commandant's new identity and expose his crimes to the world. In the process, the trail leads him to a secret organisation that helped Nazi SS officers escape justice. Thriller, based on Frederick Forsyth's novel, starring Jon Voight, Derek Jacobi and siblings Maria and Maximilian Schell

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee (1986)
programme.desc: A New York reporter searches the Australian Outback for a maverick hunter with a legendary reputation, and invites the adventurer back to America. But the die-hard Aussie needs to draw on all his survival skills to adjust to life in the urban jungle. Comedy adventure, written by and starring Paul Hogan, with Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Mark Blum

programme.title: X-Men: Apocalypse (2016)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes face the oldest and most powerful of their kind, an ancient Egyptian tyrant who is restored to life in the 1980s and plans to destroy civilisation and rebuild it in his own image. Superhero adventure sequel, starring James McAvoy, Michael Fassbender, Jennifer Lawrence and Oscar Isaac

programme.title: Brotherhood (2016)
programme.desc: Sam Peel is now married to lawyer Kayla, with whom he's raising two children, and is determined to stay out of trouble, but he is blackmailed into returning to the criminal underworld. Drama sequel concluding the Hood trilogy, written, directed by and starring Noel Clarke

programme.title: Ouija (2014)
programme.desc: A teenager recovering from the suicide of a friend persuades a group of her classmates to join her in attempting to make contact with the dead girl's spirit. They discover that she was driven to her death by dangerous supernatural forces, which they have unwittingly unleashed to prey on them. Horror, starring Olivia Cooke and Ana Coto

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian (1949)
programme.desc: French settlers are granted asylum in America in the aftermath of Napoleon's defeat at Waterloo and a Kentucky rifleman finds himself falling for one of the newcomers - a general's daughter. However, he faces a rival for her affections in the form of a ruthless landowner who plans to steal the terrritory her fellow exiles have settled on. George Waggner's Western, starring John Wayne, Vera Hruba Ralston, Philip Dorn and Oliver Hardy

programme.title: Anastasia (1956)
programme.desc: In 1920s Paris, exiled Russians claim they have found the daughter of the last Tsar, who was originally believed to have been killed with the rest of her family. She is taken into the care of a General and groomed until she can convince Anastasia's cousin Prince Paul that she is genuinely the tsarina and inherit a fortune. Historical drama, starring an Oscar-winning Ingrid Bergman, and Yul Brynner

programme.title: Decision at Sundown (1957)
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into a backwoods town intent on finding his dead wife's former lover and exacting revenge for her death. The man he blames now has total control of the town and has the sheriff at his beck and call. Undeterred, the drifter offers his enemy an ultimatum - he has until sundown to leave the town or face retribution for his crimes. Western, with Randolph Scott, John Carroll and Andrew Duggan

programme.title: Funeral in Berlin (1966)
programme.desc: Former crook and disreputable spy Harry Palmer has to carefully engineer the defection of a Russian officer responsible for safeguarding vital military secrets - but the mission proves less than straightforward. Cold War thriller and the second film to feature Len Deighton's character, starring Michael Caine, Eva Renzi, Oscar Homolka, Paul Hubschmid and Guy Doleman

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: The Take (2016)
programme.desc: An American pickpocket in Paris accidentally steals some top secret information, and finds himself on the run from the CIA. The agent in charge of the investigation recruits the thief's help when he discovers a sinister conspiracy that threatens both of them. Action thriller, starring Idris Elba and Richard Madden

programme.title: World War Z (2013)
programme.desc: A virus sweeps across the globe, turning everyone infected into mindless, ravening zombies. As entire countries fall into chaos, a United Nations investigator sets off on a journey around the world to discover the cause of the pandemic and hopefully find a cure before human civilisation is brought to an end. Thriller based on the novel by Max Brooks, starring Brad Pitt and Mireille Enos

programme.title: Child 44 (2015)
programme.desc: A secret police agent in 1950s Russia is disgraced for refusing to denounce his own wife as a traitor. Reassigned to a remote outpost, he tries to bring a serial child murderer to justice, but faces an official cover-up by a rival, who wants to maintain the illusion that Soviet society is without crime. Detective thriller based on Tom Rob Smith's novel, starring Tom Hardy, Gary Oldman and Noomi Rapace

programme.title: Rawhide (1951)
programme.desc: Outlaws hold staff and a passenger and her baby hostage at a remote stagecoach station while awaiting the arrival of a shipment of $100,000 in gold bullion. The nervous captives try to stay calm, but the tension between the gang leader and a jumpy henchman grows fraught, ending in a frantic shoot-out - with the infant in the thick of the fray. Western, starring Tyrone Power, Susan Hayward and Jack Elam

programme.title: Millions Like Us (1943)
programme.desc: A woman is happy to be called up for service during the Second World War, but disappointed to learn she will be working in a factory making aircraft parts. However, the new job brings romance in the shape of a handsome airman and a close circle of friends in her co-workers, who all rally round when tragedy strikes. Drama, starring Patricia Roc, Eric Portman, Gordon Jackson and Basil Radford

programme.title: The Savage (1952)
programme.desc: A white man raised by the Sioux after his family were killed by Crow warriors finds his loyalties tested in later life. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Susan Morrow and Peter Hansen

programme.title: Alvarez Kelly (1966)
programme.desc: A cynical, mercenary cattle drover sets out to deliver a herd to soldiers at a Union base during the American Civil War. During the journey, he is kidnapped by a Confederate colonel, who hopes to persuade him to help steal the animals and take them deep into rebel territory. Western, starring William Holden, Richard Widmark and Janice Rule

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: An expedition to find King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. The tycoon behind the mission sends his assistant, a former CIA agent, to find out what became of the explorers - only to discover that the party met a grisly fate at the hands of a horde of vicious apes. Action adventure based on Michael Crichton's novel, with Dylan Walsh, Laura Linney, Tim Curry and Grant Heslov

programme.title: Commando (1985)
programme.desc: The daughter of retired special forces officer John Matrix is kidnapped by an old comrade-in-arms, now in league with a deposed former dictator. The tyrant plans to use the girl to force Matrix into assassinating the head of the country he once ruled, but is unprepared for the lengths to which the veteran soldier will go to rescue his child. Action adventure, with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Rae Dawn Chong

programme.title: Bone Tomahawk (2015)
programme.desc: After an outlaw unknowingly leads a band of cannibalistic cave-dwellers into the peaceful town of Bright Hope, the elderly sheriff rounds up a posse to rescue townsfolk abducted by the ferocious tribesmen. Western horror, starring Kurt Russell and Patrick Wilson

programme.title: The Quiet Ones (2014)
programme.desc: An academic scientist recruits a group of Oxford students for a strange experiment, performing a series of tests on a woman in the hope of tapping into her apparent psychic abilities and deliberately manifesting a poltergeist. However, they soon find they are unable to control the dark forces they unleash. Horror, starring Jared Harris and Sam Claflin

programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina goes back in time to the Salem witch trials, where she has to defend Jenny against accusations of witchcraft

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince can save her

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily is reunited with her father at Thanksgiving, and explains the real reason why they stopped speaking three years earlier - but disagrees with Marshall on the best way to heal the rift. American sitcom, starring Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted's friends do more harm than good when they try to help him impress a woman from his college days. Marshall makes an effort to rectify his life choices after finding a letter he wrote as a teenager detailing what he hoped to achieve as an adult - prompting Lily to point out the positive side of his working life

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: As the family prepares for their flight to JJ's summer camp, Maya gets a shock at the airport. Ray sees the summer holiday as an opportunity to reinvent himself, while Jimmy and Dylan turn the trip to camp into a father-daughter bonding moment

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: While JJ's at summer camp, Maya decides that the family can no longer use his disability as an excuse to let their own lives fall through the cracks. Maya, Jimmy and Dylan make dramatic changes, but Ray decides he'd rather watch his family's attempts than make any of his own. When JJ comes home, Dylan finds a love note in JJ's luggage from Alexa, a girl he met at camp, who wants to give JJ his first kiss

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldon's old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howard's girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Adam decides to see the movie Willow instead of spending Mother's Day with Beverly, he must find a way to get back into her good graces. Barry is tired of his status as middle child and fights Erica for his right to the college of his choice

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam unintentionally lets it slip that Barry never completed his community service requirement. Erica makes plans for her and Geoff to follow The Grateful Dead all summer, while Barry and his friends graduate from high school.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While the squad attends a funeral in Los Angeles, Captain Holt learns that he is in the running for his dream job: Commissioner of the NYPD. however, after they miss their return flight to New York, Peralta must find a way to get Holt back in time for his interview. Santiago tries to convince everyone that she can be laid back, Jeffords panics about losing his first-class flight, and Boyle pries into Diaz's personal life

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz begs Peralta to help her break some big news to her parents, but her plan is thrown off track when Mr and Mrs Diaz wrongly assume that their daughter and her colleague are dating. The squad suffers internet problems after the Cyber Crimes Unit move into the office downstairs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon are forced to defend themselves against criticism from an online bully after publishing a physics paper. Meanwhile, the girls confront embarrassing moments from their pasts during a night in. Comedy, guest starring Stephen Hawking, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard receives shocking news as everyone prepares for the re-opening of the comic-book store. Penny tries to teach Sheldon how to 'let it go', but she is unable to follow her own advice when she learns something infuriating about Amy. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Fillion, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Elliot faces a malpractice suit brought by a disgruntled patient who did not die when she said he would. JD beams with pride after correcting a misdiagnosis by Dr Cox, and Jordan is admitted to the hospital. Guest starring illusionist David Copperfield, with Zach Braff and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Elliot continues her search for a place to live, JD asks the gift-shop girl out on a date and Carla has romantic problems with Turk. Meanwhile, Dr Cox lets pregnant Jordan move into his apartment. Comedy, guest starring Sarah Lancaster (Chuck), with Zach Braff, Donald Faison and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: After putting JJ under pressure in her attempts to get a family dog, Dylan takes a vow of silence to better understand what it is like to be her brother

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Jimmy convinces Maya to go on a night out together on New Year's Eve. Meanwhile, Dylan spends the evening trying to win the new family dog's affection

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members worry about Diaz when she responds to an active shooter alert, but are instructed to stay back at the precinct building and are powerless to help. Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When a publisher shows interest in her recipes, Beverly prepares to finally realise her dream of writing a cookbook. Meanwhile, Geoff finds himself caught between Erica and Barry

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoff is excited to join in, despite Erica's reservations. Barry must face the fact that he has not been a good friend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Lainey has high hopes for Coach Mellor's love life. Meanwhile, Principal Glascott is unsure how to handle the difficult librarian, Dr Ness

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies returns to set tasks for Dave Gorman, Al Murray, Rob Beckett, Sara Pascoe and Paul Chowdhry involving vegetable propulsion, snowmen and Swedes

programme.title: Keeping Up with the Joneses (2016)
programme.desc: A suburban couple become embroiled in an international espionage plot when they discover that their seemingly perfect new neighbours are actually government spies. Action comedy, starring Zach Galifianakis, Isla Fisher, Jon Hamm and Gal Gadot

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including Sex Tape, Britain's Got Talent, Line of Duty, This Morning, The All New Monty: Who Bares Wins, The Yorkshire Vet and the News are subjected to scrutiny, as the armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in May 2019

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick, still in galactic prison, puts an intricate escape plan into action. Back on Earth - now under Federation control - Morty and Summer have an argument about their grandfather that gets out of control

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Drusilla turns the resurrected Darla back into one of the undead, and they embark on a murderous rampage across the city. As Angel races against time to put a stop to their dastardly activities, he fails to notice his single-minded determination is leading to conflict with those closest to him. Guest starring Juliet Landau

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dina, 39, is keen to settle down and start a family, but her date, 41-year-old Stephen, is a born adventurer who has climbed the Matterhorn and swum oceans. Will he run a mile when she shares her intentions with him? Margaret, 73, hasn't been on a date for 44 years and is looking for a family man who shares her love of music and life, while art student Rachel, meets vegan singer-songwriter and self-confessed hippie Hari

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: Speechless

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree help British people making French castles their home or running businesses from them. In the opening episode, the duo give Johnny a crash course in the dos and don'ts of chateau shopping before he and his wife start the search for their own dream place. Jonathan and Michael, who are struggling to turn their magnificent French castle into a money-making venture, explore some of their chateau's caves in the hope of finding a buried fortune. Plus, Phil and Angelina struggle to pitch their chateau as the perfect place for a 50th wedding anniversary party when they can't see eye to eye themselves

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Sam and Eryka in Brockley in south-east London, who plan to build a contemporary warehouse-style home in a derelict industrial unit, including studio space for artist Eryka. programme.title: Four in a Bed

In the rooms, Donna Taylor from Jasmine House in Leicestershire makes a hair-raising discovery, while mother-and-daughter team Lesley and Chloe Priestly take a dislike to one of their competitors at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Jasmine House in Lutterworth, Leicestershire managed by Donna Taylor who believes in a no frills approach. But it doesn't take long for Martin and Sara to realise all the added extras in the room don't add up. During the afternoon Leslie and Chloe show their fighting spirit during a kickboxing lesson and all the B&Bers square up to their host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the luxury Halliwell House in Cheshire for the third day of the contest, where owners Martin Hulme and Sara Williams charge nearly £500 per night. Donna is astonished at the room rates, while David and Ewa are expecting nothing but perfection, but the self-service approach at breakfast confuses the guests, leaving Martin and Sara defiant in the face of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at Soar Chapel Guest House in Ebbw Vale, the family home of mum and daughter Lesley and Chloe Priestly. Expectations are high for this duo and one guest in particular is not disappointed. Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. David and Ewa Woodward want to challenge Martin's criticism over the way they run their business. Next, Donna Taylor wants to find out more about the issue that caused Martin and Sara to lose sleep. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The zebras have a newcomer to their herd, Okoth, who starts to make a play for power, which does not go down well with zebra Florence. Meanwhile, Keeper Isolde comes up with an unusual plan to give the zoo's three Komodo dragon sisters some much needed space from each other, and Chester's male lemurs are in for a shock with a female on her way to share their island

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

Meanwhile, Phil and Angelina clear their garden for a wedding anniversary party, but struggle to dispose of the debris. Elsewhere, Johnny and Ashley view two properties as they search for a dream chateau

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Jo and Shaun Bennett, a couple with a love of gothic architecture and horror movies, plan to use their budget of £400,000 to build an Addams Family-style house, complete with a stained-glass window, a stone fireplace and an oak staircase featuring gargoyles. However, completing the five-bedroom home on limited funds proves difficult

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department, focusing on patients and their families, as well as the work of the staff dealing with the emergencies. This episode follows the stories of three patients and how they cope when life takes an unexpected turn, including a patient who severed three of his fingers with an electric saw. Elsewhere, a man with motor neurone disease is rushed to St George's with severe sepsis, and a teenager struggles to come to terms with the impact of serious injuries he sustained in a car crash six weeks ago

programme.title: Shut-Ins: Britain's Fattest People
programme.desc: The documentary series follows 24-year-old single mother Emily, who has lost control of her eating habits, causing her to reach a worrying 26 stone. Emily puts herself in the hands of a leading bariatric surgeon, but also seeks the services of a behavioural psychologist in a bid to understand what is driving her compulsive behaviour

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Town's Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department, focusing on patients and their families, as well as the work of the staff dealing with the emergencies. This episode follows the stories of three patients and how they cope when life takes an unexpected turn, including a patient who severed three of his fingers with an electric saw. Elsewhere, a man with motor neurone disease is rushed to St George's with severe sepsis, and a teenager struggles to come to terms with the impact of serious injuries he sustained in a car crash six weeks ago

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of China's Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the country's cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the national dish. Kate Quilton looks into where multivitamins come from and how much we need them, while Matt Tebbutt visits the UK's leading clotted cream producer in Cornwall and an astonishing algae farm in the desert in Israel

They'll be sharing their new home with bats, birds and thousands of flies, but Angel is in love with their new home and the clan begins the process of adjusting to French country life

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, Charlie Luxton helps Roz and Mick Abrahams build a compact contemporary home at the bottom of their garden. Mick and Roz are downsizing from a huge house, and designing a home half the size causes numerous headaches. Charlie shares some bright ideas to demonstrate that, even with a smaller home, it is still possible to think big

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Callum Hogg and Lauren Abraham's modern Park Hotel in Gloucestershire, where sisters Sue Lewis and Wendy Germann are impressed by the colourful decor, but it's not an opinion held by all. The guests are not impressed with having to pay extra for breakfast and Callum and Lauren are faced with robust feedback that leaves them wanting answers and thinking not everyone is being fair

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Trowbridge in Wiltshire to Sue's B&B, which is run by Sue Lewis and her sister, Wendy Germann. Breakfast at the communal table has its awkward moments and Sue is under pressure, having never cooked for so many before. However, it's the feedback that leaves the hosts wondering if maybe some of the guests have not been that straightforward

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to The Talbot in Iwerne Minster, Dorset for the third day of the competition, where hosts Erika Watt and Ellie Gill greet their guests. The rooms do not live up to their good first impression and Callum and Lauren are quick to find fault. At breakfast, tensions simmer as Wendy calls Cameron a creep, and at feedback, some of the comments send Erika and Ellie into fits of giggles

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth visit of the week is to The Old Rectory in Llangattock, south Wales, where young hotel manager Cameron Thomas likes to keep things professional. Despite wanting to find fault, Lauren and Callum are soon to admit their bridal suite is top notch, but Erika and Ellie think there may be some cleaning issues. During an afternoon of canoe racing the group members show their competitive sides

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. The Park Hotel in Gloucestershire is up first as owners Callum Hogg and Lauren Abraham want to get to the bottom of why Cameron didn't sleep soundly. Next, Sue Lewis from Sue's B&B seeks to discover the deasons for Callum and Lauren's low score for the cleanliness. When all issues are resolved, the winning establishment is revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Spider monkey Mary is 50 and has had 19 children, and the keepers worry that another pregnancy could be risky, so they introduce younger female Kiara to the group in the hope that Mary's long-term partner Popoyan will develop a relationship with her instead. The staff also hope to breed dominant female giant otter Icana with new arrival Diego and plan to bring two feuding sloths closer together, while setting up a speed-dating event for three-legged chameleon Tripod

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge visits Philip and Angelina and helps them build a bridge at their chateau - will Dick's design work? Jonathan and Michael test the services they provide at their chateau by inviting Michael's old college mates for the weekend, while Jonny and Ashley continue the search for their dream chateau

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets retired chef Phillip Murphy, who lives in a cluster of disconnected buildings directly below a volcanic plug called The Nut in the town of Stanley, Tasmania

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Pru and Richard Irvine decide to build a family home on an old industrial site in the Midlothian countryside, but will only be allowed to go ahead if their house blends in with the landscape. Unfortunately, the modern property they envisage could be considered an eyesore by the conservative locals and they underestimate the long hours needed to manage the project. Kevin McCloud monitors their progress

programme.title: The Kennedys: Tragedy & Triumph
programme.desc: Series charting the lives of Joseph and Rose Kennedy and their children, uncovering how and why this family so significantly impacted 20th century America, revealing how personal relationships within the Kennedy dynasty helped shape national and global events from the Cuban Missile Crisis to the struggle for civil rights legislation. In the final episode, the Kennedy administration is rocked by fresh scandals that threaten to destroy Jack's marriage, derail his presidency, and ruin any hope of re-election

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning in a quiet Milton Keynes street, a single bullet was shot through an open window. The victim was a 19-year-old man. What followed was a frantic 999 call and an investigation by Thames Valley Police to find the culprit. This documentary follows the case as the detectives try to piece together the moments leading up to that fatal shot. But it soon turns out there is more to the inquiry than meets the eye with a potential second suspect

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 61-year-old woman is airlifted to hospital after a car mounted the pavement and ran her over and doctors quickly get her into the CT scanner to ascertain the full extent of her injuries. Elsewhere, 91-year-old Sam arrives after suffering a suspected stroke, and four-month-old boy Teddy is rushed in after falling face first out of his car seat, hitting the pavement

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts another round of light-hearted words-and-numbers fun, with Sean Lock and Katherine Ryan taking on Jon Richardson and David Mitchell. Nick Helm is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley does the adding up

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A woman and her sons bring in their springer spaniel puppy for complicated surgery on its badly deformed hind leg. The owner of an eight-year-old cocker spaniel waits to hear if her dog's cancer has spread, and the vet treats a two-year-old cat, which is dragging one of its back legs

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 61-year-old woman is airlifted to hospital after a car mounted the pavement and ran her over and doctors quickly get her into the CT scanner to ascertain the full extent of her injuries.
